name: ASHFORD HOSPITALITY TRUST INC
business: Ashford Hospitality Trust Inc is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns upscale and upper upscale full-service hotels in the United States. As of December 31, 2025, it owned 68 consolidated operating hotel properties with 16,445 rooms, primarily branded under Hilton, Hyatt, Marriott, and Intercontinental Hotel Group. The company does not operate hotels directly; it leases them to taxable REIT subsidiaries which engage management companies, including Remington Hospitality which manages 50 of 68 hotels.

exposures.sentence: We are increasingly dependent on information technology, and cyber-attacks, security problems, artificial intelligence-related risks, or other disruption and expanding social media vehicles present new risks.

catalysts.event: Rights expiration under shareholder rights plan
catalysts.sentence: Pursuant to the terms of the Rights Agreement, the Rights will expire on the earliest of (i) 5:00 p.m. New York City time on December 14, 2026

On December 23, 2025, Ashford Inc. and Ashford Hospitality Advisors LLC delivered written notice to the Company of the Advisor's election to extend the term of the Advisory Agreement for an additional ten-year term, commencing on January 14, 2031 and expiring on January 14, 2041.
On January 13, 2026, the Company extended its Highland mortgage loan secured by 18 hotels, ... has a final maturity date of July 9, 2026.

catalysts.event: Outside date for exclusion of certain asset sales from change of control calculation extended
catalysts.sentence: The Sixth Amendment further extends the outside date for which any sale or disposition of any of the Company's Highland Portfolio and JPM8 hotel properties securing the associated mortgage loans following an event of default (as defined in the Advisory Agreement) would be excluded from the numerator of the calculation of the percentage of gross book value of the Company's assets sold or disposed (but, for the avoidance of doubt, included in the denominator of such calculation) for purposes of determining whether a Company Change of Control (as defined in the Advisory Agreement) has occurred, from August 15, 2026 to November 15, 2026.
